title: A Better Offer
scenario: After six months of solid work, you land a new job that pays ₹62,000 a month, up from your current ₹46,000. Friends are already nudging you to celebrate the ₹16,000 jump with a new phone and weekend trips. How do you treat this raise?

choices.label: Keep your lifestyle flat and route most of the raise into savings and a SIP
choices.lesson: Avoiding lifestyle inflation when income rises is the single biggest lever for building wealth early.

choices.label: Upgrade your rent, phone and outings to match the new pay
choices.lesson: Spending a raise immediately resets your baseline costs and leaves you no better off than before.
